visual_enhancers.noise_texture: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

marketing.hero: Asymmetric split. Left: Big typography. Right: Full-bleed product texture.
marketing.features: Bento Grid (Mode A). Mix of large cards (images) and small cards (icons/text).

product_listing.card_style: Minimal. Image dominant. Price and Title below. Hover: Show 'Add to Cart'.

dashboard.card_style: Flat, 1px border. No shadow. High information density.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-12 px-8 rounded-sm font-semibold tracking-wide shadow-sm active:scale-95 transition-transform
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-12 px-8 rounded-sm font-medium transition-colors
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-12 px-8 rounded-sm transition-colors

cards.product: group relative overflow-hidden bg-card border border-border/50 rounded-sm hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors
cards.feature: bg-secondary/30 border border-border/50 p-8 rounded-sm hover:bg-secondary/50 transition-colors
cards.stat: bg-white border border-border p-6 rounded-sm flex flex-col gap-2

inputs.default: flex h-12 w-full rounded-sm border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

hero_texture.alt: Close-up of shiny, crinkled aluminum foil texture
hero_texture.usage: Use as a background texture or hero image with overlay.

chef_usage.usage: Use in 'How to use' or 'Quality' sections.

motion_guidelines.page_load: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.5, ease: 'easeOut' }}
motion_guidelines.stagger: variants={{ hidden: { opacity: 0 }, show: { opacity: 1, transition: { staggerChildren: 0.1 } } }}

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all text colors meet APCA contrast standards against the white background.
Use the 'Manrope' font for all headings. Import it in index.css.
Do not use generic 'card' components for the product grid; create a custom, minimal product card.
Implement a 'Quick View' feature for products using a Dialog component.
The 'Admin' dashboard should be distinct from the 'Shop' - denser, more tabular.
Use the defined image URLs. Do not leave empty src attributes.
Add a subtle 'noise' texture to the background of the Hero section to give it a premium paper/foil feel.
For the 'Add to Cart' button, use a loading state animation to provide feedback.
Ensure the layout is fully responsive. On mobile, the product grid should be 1 column, tablet 2, desktop 3 or 4.
Use 'Sonner' for toast notifications (e.g., 'Added to cart').
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all).
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters as icons.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
